parameters.jsCode:
const senderName = $json.senderName;
return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `🌟 *Assalam-o-Alaikum ${senderName}!*

Welcome to our Help Bot! How can I assist you today?

Please choose an option:

1️⃣ Pricing / Rates
2️⃣ Place an Order
3️⃣ Track your Order
4️⃣ Support / Help
5️⃣ Talk to a Human Agent

_Reply with a number (1-5) or type your question directly._`,
  replyType: 'text'
}}];

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `💰 *Our Pricing / Rates:*

📦 Standard Package: Rs. 500
🚀 Express Package: Rs. 800
⭐ Premium Package: Rs. 1200

✅ All packages include:
• Free Delivery
• 24/7 Support
• Money-back Guarantee

To place an order, reply *ORDER* or type *2*

_For custom pricing, contact: +923396267447_`,
  replyType: 'text'
}}];

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `🛒 *Place an Order*

To place your order, please send us the following details:

1. Your Full Name
2. Complete Address
3. Product/Service Name
4. Quantity
5. Contact Number

Example:
_Ali Ahmed, House #5 Street 3 Lahore, Standard Package, 1 piece, 0301-1234567_

📞 Or call us directly: +923396267447

⏰ Order Processing Time: 24-48 hours`,
  replyType: 'text'
}}];

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `📍 *Track Your Order*

To track your order, please provide:

🔢 Your *Order ID* or *Tracking Number*

Format: Send your order ID like:
_TRACK-12345_

Or share the phone number used for ordering.

⏱ Delivery Status Updates:
• Confirmed ✅
• Packed 📦
• Dispatched 🚚
• Out for Delivery 🛵
• Delivered ✔️

_For urgent tracking: +923396267447_`,
  replyType: 'text'
}}];

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `🆘 *Support Center*

How can we help you? Please describe your issue or choose:

🔧 *Common Issues:*
• Delayed delivery
• Wrong product received
• Refund request
• Account issues

Please describe your problem in detail and we will get back to you within *2 hours* during business hours.

⏰ Support Hours:
Mon-Sat: 9 AM - 9 PM (PKT)

📞 Emergency: +923396267447`,
  replyType: 'text'
}}];

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `👤 *Connecting to Human Agent...*

Please hold! A team member will join this chat shortly.

⏳ Average wait time: 5-10 minutes
⏰ Available: 9 AM - 9 PM (Mon-Sat)

📞 For immediate help, call:
*+923396267447*

_If it's urgent, please call directly. We're here to help!_ 😊`,
  replyType: 'text',
  notifyOwner: true
}}];

return [{ json: {
  ...$json,
  replyMessage: `🤔 *Sorry, I didn't understand that.*

Please choose from the menu:

1️⃣ Pricing / Rates
2️⃣ Place an Order
3️⃣ Track your Order
4️⃣ Support / Help
5️⃣ Talk to Human Agent

_Or type your question and I'll try to help!_`,
  replyType: 'text'
}}];

parameters.name: text
